payload.claim_text: The RCC Annex is currently under construction with anticipated completion in 2028
payload.subject: RCC Annex construction

records.display_name: Muhammad Afzal operates newsstands at Deer Park, Ronkonkoma, Long Beach

payload.claim_text: Mr. Afzal currently operates newsstands at LIRR Stations at Deer Park, Ronkonkoma, and Long Beach, and has a proven track record of successful operations within the LIRR portfolio
payload.subject: Muhammad Afzal LIRR operations

records.display_name: GCT expanded event venues beyond Vanderbilt Hall

payload.claim_text: Within the last two years, MTA Real Estate, in concert with MNR, expanded event venues in GCT from Vanderbilt Hall and Vanderbilt Bridge to include the Biltmore Room, the Graybar Passage, the Dining Concourse and limited use of the Main Concourse (collectively, the GCT Event Venues)
payload.subject: Grand Central Terminal event venues

records.display_name: MTA GCR has leased at 111 Washington Ave since 1987

payload.claim_text: The MTA has leased space for GCR at 111 Washington Avenue since 1987
payload.subject: MTA GCR Albany office

records.display_name: LIRR EAP lease expired Oct 2024, in holdover

payload.claim_text: This lease with Alzamora Commercial Holdings, LLC., successor in interest to Khal-Hal Realty, LLC for LIRR EAP offices expired October 14, 2024. The LIRR has remained in occupancy undisturbed as a holdover occupant
payload.subject: LIRR EAP lease at 300 Old Country Road

payload.claim_text: Skylight's final report stated that GCT's brand and unparalleled pedestrian volume makes it a uniquely attractive asset for commercial and experiential events and activations. However, it indicated that maximum value was not captured in the current Event Fee Schedule.
payload.subject: GCT event venue valuation

records.display_name: ERY TDR pricing at 65% of appraised fee value

payload.claim_text: MTA will apply a percentage of 65% to the final appraised value per square foot of the fee of the receiving parcel to establish the per square foot value of the ERY TDRs
payload.subject: ERY TDR pricing mechanism

payload.description: Lessor for NYCT facility at 27-35 Jackson Avenue, Long Island City, NY
